channel.title: Comments on: Dogfish Head: Squall IPA, Ep. 160
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: rc95
item.dc:creator: rc95
item.description: Why would you do this to us? Squall's probably the best beer Sam ever made, and then he stopped.
item.content:encoded: Why would you do this to us? Squall’s probably the best beer Sam ever made, and then he stopped.

item.title: By: Don Smith
item.dc:creator: Don Smith
item.description:
Wow, I can't believe you just did a podcast tasting of DFH Squall. You taste a lot of beers that I can not get here in Connecticut but tasting one that can not be found anywhere really hurts. This was on my top 5 list and I was looking forward to another season of get togethers where Squall would fill our glasses. I was very disappointed to learn that Sam decided to retire it and bring out a new 75 minute in it's place. I'm hoping that the 75 minute fills the void. And if you find more Squall hidden away in a dark corner of someones cellar, feel free to mail me a bottle.
Hey guys, keep up the good work. I enjoy the podcasts. I envy you!
Don Smith
item.content:encoded:
Wow, I can’t believe you just did a podcast tasting of DFH Squall. You taste a lot of beers that I can not get here in Connecticut but tasting one that can not be found anywhere really hurts. This was on my top 5 list and I was looking forward to another season of get togethers where Squall would fill our glasses. I was very disappointed to learn that Sam decided to retire it and bring out a new 75 minute in it’s place. I’m hoping that the 75 minute fills the void. And if you find more Squall hidden away in a dark corner of someones cellar, feel free to mail me a bottle.

Hey guys, keep up the good work. I enjoy the podcasts. I envy you!

Don Smith
